EventDescriptions.EventDescription: The connection of the user {object.account.name} established from host {src.host} is rejected due to the rule "{event_src.rule}"
The connection of the user {object.account.name} established from host {src.host} to host {dst.host}:{dst.port} is rejected due to the rule "{event_src.rule}"
A connection from host {src.host} is rejected due to the rule "{event_src.rule}"
